zh.lifeSummary: 當Lt Robert Vinton於1595年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德利時，他的父親Thomas Vinton34歲，母親Joan Sharpe31歲。他於1616年4月9日與Jane Stones在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 邁克爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1639年在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lt Robert Vinton于1595年出生在英国英格兰爾阿爾德利时，他的父亲Thomas Vinton34岁，母亲Joan Sharpe31岁。他于1616年4月9日与Jane Stones在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 邁克爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1639年在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Finton   with voicing of the initial consonant (see   Fenton  ). In Sussex and Kent the name was probably confused with   Winton  .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Lt Robert Vinton was born in 1595, in Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Vinton, was 34 and his mother, Joan Sharpe, was 31. He married Jane Stones on 9 April 1616, in Saint Michael, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1639, in Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lt Robert Vinton est né en 1595, à Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Vinton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Sharpe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Jane Stones le 9 avril 1616, à Saint Michael, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1639, à Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lt Robert Vintonが1595年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルダーリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Vintonは34歳，母Joan Sharpeは31歳であった。1616年4月9日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサイント ミチャエルでJane Stonesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクブレイントレで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lt Robert Vinton(이)가 1595년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알델리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Vinton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Sharpe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1616년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 세인트 믹하얼에서 Jane Stones(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 브레이트리에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lt Robert Vinton родился в 1595 г. в местности алдирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Vinton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Sharpe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Stones 9 апреля 1616 г. в местности сеинт мачаел, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1639 г. в местности бреинтри, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 44 лет.

Se casó con Jane Stones el 9 de abril de 1616, en Saint Michael, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1639, en Braintree, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 44 años.
